cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out if Michael tells the truth. So, there are a bunch of people here: Jerry, Helene, Alexis, Sherrie, and Michael. Each one is making a statement about the others. The question is whether Michael is telling the truth or lying. First, let me list out all the statements again to make sure I have them right. - Jerry lies. (This is Helene's statement.) - Helene says Jerry lies. - Alexis says Helene tells the truth. - Sherrie says Alexis tells the truth. - Michael says Sherrie tells the truth. Wait, actually, the first part is "Jerry lies. Helene says Jerry lies." So maybe the first statement is that Jerry is lying, and then Helene says that Jerry lies.
